scripts.prebuild:web: cd ../web && npm run build && node -e "const fs=require('fs');const path=require('path');const src=path.join('.','.next','standalone');const dest=path.join('..','desktop','web-bundle');if(fs.existsSync(dest))fs.rmSync(dest,{recursive:true});fs.cpSync(src,dest,{recursive:true});fs.cpSync(path.join('.','.next','static'),path.join(dest,'apps','web','.next','static'),{recursive:true});fs.cpSync(path.join('.','public'),path.join(dest,'apps','web','public'),{recursive:true});console.log('Web bundle copied to desktop/web-bundle')"
scripts.build:installer: npm run prebuild:web && electron-builder --win nsis --publish never
scripts.build:portable: npm run prebuild:web && electron-builder --win portable --publish never
